name: 2 flat whites (fortified soy)
ingredients: Unsweetened fortified soy milk:480; Coffee beans:16
steps: Pull or brew two shots of espresso.|Steam and froth the fortified soy milk until silky.|Split the milk between the two coffees to make two flat whites.

name: Tofu scramble + wholegrain toast
ingredients: Calcium-set firm tofu:150; Spinach:60; Nutritional yeast:8; Wholegrain bread:1
steps: Crumble the tofu and pat dry. Wilt the spinach in a hot pan with a splash of water, then set aside.|Add the tofu with nutritional yeast, a pinch of turmeric and salt; cook 5-6 min until golden, stirring.|Fold the spinach back through, toast the bread and pile the scramble on top.

name: Soy yogurt protein bowl + berries
ingredients: Fortified soy yogurt:200; Pea/soy protein isolate:20; Mixed berries:80; Chia seeds:10
steps: Whisk the protein isolate into the soy yogurt until smooth.|Top with berries and chia seeds.|Rest 5 min so the chia softens, or eat straight away.

name: High-protein overnight oats
ingredients: Rolled oats:40; Unsweetened fortified soy milk:200; Pea/soy protein isolate:15; Chia seeds:8
steps: Stir oats, soy milk, protein isolate and chia together in a jar.|Seal and refrigerate overnight (or at least 4 hours).|Loosen with a splash more soy milk in the morning and top as you like.

name: Besan chickpea pancake + yogurt
ingredients: Chickpea (gram) flour:50; Spinach:40; Fortified soy yogurt:100
steps: Whisk gram flour with about 80 ml water, a pinch of salt and turmeric into a smooth batter; stir in chopped spinach.|Pour into a hot oiled pan and cook 2-3 min each side until set and golden.|Serve with the soy yogurt on the side.

name: Tofu & kale breakfast hash
ingredients: Calcium-set firm tofu:150; Kale:80; Cherry tomatoes:80
steps: Pan-fry cubed tofu in a little oil until crisp at the edges.|Add halved cherry tomatoes and shredded kale; cook until the kale wilts and tomatoes soften.|Season with salt, pepper and chilli flakes.

name: Peanut butter protein oats
ingredients: Rolled oats:35; Unsweetened fortified soy milk:200; Peanut butter:12; Pea/soy protein isolate:20; Chia seeds:5
steps: Simmer the oats with the soy milk 4-5 min until creamy.|Off the heat, stir through peanut butter, protein isolate and chia.|Top with a splash more soy milk and a pinch of cinnamon.

name: Chia pudding + soy yogurt & berries
ingredients: Chia seeds:20; Unsweetened fortified soy milk:120; Fortified soy yogurt:100; Pea/soy protein isolate:12; Mixed berries:60
steps: Whisk chia, soy milk and protein isolate; rest 10 min, then whisk again to break up clumps.|Chill at least 2 hours (or overnight) until set.|Layer with soy yogurt and berries to serve.

name: Chickpea-flour omelette, spinach & tomato
ingredients: Chickpea (gram) flour:50; Spinach:50; Cherry tomatoes:60; Nutritional yeast:6
steps: Whisk gram flour with about 90 ml water, nutritional yeast, a pinch of salt, black salt (kala namak) and turmeric.|Pour into a hot oiled non-stick pan; scatter over spinach and halved tomatoes.|Cook 3-4 min until the base sets, fold over and serve.

name: Tempeh scramble breakfast wrap
ingredients: Tempeh:80; Wholemeal tortilla:1; Spinach:40; Nutritional yeast:5
steps: Crumble and pan-fry the tempeh with a splash of soy sauce until browned.|Add spinach and nutritional yeast; cook until wilted.|Spoon into a warmed tortilla, roll up and slice.

name: Tofu poke bowl
ingredients: Calcium-set firm tofu:120; Edamame (shelled):80; Brown rice (dry):40; Nori / seaweed:5; Sesame seeds:8
steps: Cook the brown rice and let it cool slightly.|Cube the tofu and toss in a little soy sauce; sear or use as-is.|Build over the rice with edamame, torn nori and sesame seeds; dress with soy and lime.

name: Lentil, kale & tahini salad
ingredients: Cooked green lentils:120; Kale:80; Tahini:15; Pumpkin seeds:15
steps: Massage the shredded kale with a little oil and salt until softened.|Toss with the cooked lentils and pumpkin seeds.|Loosen the tahini with lemon and water and drizzle over.

name: Tempeh hummus wrap
ingredients: Tempeh:80; Wholemeal tortilla:1; Hummus:30; Salad leaves:40
steps: Slice and pan-fry the tempeh with a splash of soy sauce until golden.|Spread hummus over the tortilla and add salad leaves and tempeh.|Roll up tightly and slice in half.

name: Edamame & tofu stir-fry
ingredients: Calcium-set firm tofu:150; Edamame (shelled):100; Pak choi:100; Broccoli:100
steps: Sear cubed tofu in a hot wok until golden, then remove.|Stir-fry pak choi and broccoli 3-4 min with a splash of water.|Return the tofu, add edamame and a soy-garlic-ginger sauce; toss to coat.

name: Chickpea & spinach curry + rice
ingredients: Chickpeas (cooked):130; Spinach:100; Chopped tomatoes:100; Brown rice (dry):40
steps: Soften onion, garlic and ginger; add curry spices and the chopped tomatoes.|Stir in the chickpeas and simmer 10 min, then fold in spinach until wilted.|Serve over cooked brown rice.

name: Seitan & white bean bowl
ingredients: Seitan:80; White beans (cooked):120; Mixed greens:80; Brown rice (dry):30
steps: Cook the brown rice.|Pan-fry the sliced seitan until browned; warm the white beans through with garlic.|Pile over rice with the greens and finish with lemon and olive oil.

name: Tofu, quinoa & broccoli Buddha bowl
ingredients: Calcium-set firm tofu:120; Quinoa (dry):40; Broccoli:100; Tahini:12
steps: Cook the quinoa; steam or roast the broccoli.|Roast or pan-fry the cubed tofu until golden.|Assemble in a bowl and drizzle with tahini thinned with lemon and water.

name: Lentil & sweet potato soup + bread
ingredients: Cooked green lentils:150; Sweet potato:120; Chopped tomatoes:80; Wholegrain bread:1
steps: Soften onion and garlic; add diced sweet potato, lentils, chopped tomatoes and about 400 ml stock.|Simmer 20 min until the sweet potato and lentils are tender.|Blend partly if you like, then serve with the bread.

name: Black bean & tofu burrito bowl
ingredients: Black beans (cooked):120; Brown rice (dry):30; Calcium-set firm tofu:80; Avocado:30; Salad leaves:30
steps: Cook the brown rice.|Pan-fry the cubed tofu until golden; warm the black beans with cumin and a pinch of salt.|Bowl up rice, beans, tofu, sliced avocado and salad leaves; squeeze over lime.

name: Tofu peanut noodle salad
ingredients: Calcium-set firm tofu:120; Soba noodles:40; Peanut butter:14; Broccoli:80; Salad leaves:30
steps: Cook and cool the soba noodles.|Whisk peanut butter with soy sauce, lime and a little warm water into a dressing.|Toss the noodles with cubed tofu, blanched broccoli and salad leaves in the dressing.

name: Tofu & pak choi soba
ingredients: Calcium-set firm tofu:130; Pak choi:120; Broccoli:80; Soba noodles:50; Sesame seeds:8
steps: Cook the soba and rinse.|Sear cubed tofu until crisp; stir-fry pak choi and broccoli with garlic and ginger.|Toss noodles and veg in a soy-sesame sauce; top with tofu and sesame seeds.

name: Lentil bolognese
ingredients: Cooked green lentils:130; Chopped tomatoes:150; Courgette:100; Wholewheat pasta (dry):60
steps: Soften onion, carrot and garlic; add the grated courgette.|Add lentils and chopped tomatoes with herbs and simmer 15 min.|Serve over cooked wholewheat pasta.

name: Tempeh & broccoli traybake
ingredients: Tempeh:120; Broccoli:120; Bell peppers:100; Sweet potato:120
steps: Heat oven to 200C. Cube tempeh, sweet potato and peppers; toss with oil and seasoning.|Roast 20 min, add the broccoli, then roast 10 min more.|Finish with a squeeze of lemon.

name: Tofu saag + rice
ingredients: Calcium-set firm tofu:150; Spinach:200; Chopped tomatoes:80; Brown rice (dry):40
steps: Wilt the spinach and blend to a coarse puree.|Soften onion, garlic, ginger and spices; add chopped tomatoes, then the spinach.|Fold in seared tofu, simmer 5 min and serve over rice.

name: Black bean & tofu chilli
ingredients: Black beans (cooked):100; Calcium-set firm tofu:100; Bell peppers:100; Brown rice (dry):30
steps: Soften onion, pepper and garlic with chilli and cumin.|Add the black beans and crumbled tofu; simmer 15 min with a splash of water.|Serve over rice with lime.

name: Seitan steak, greens & mash
ingredients: Seitan:90; Kale:100; Potatoes:200; Unsweetened fortified soy milk:50
steps: Boil the potatoes until tender, then mash with the soy milk and seasoning.|Pan-fry the seitan until caramelised on both sides.|Saute the kale and plate with the mash and seitan.

name: Tofu katsu curry + rice
ingredients: Calcium-set firm tofu:130; Brown rice (dry):40; Broccoli:80; Chickpea (gram) flour:15; Bell peppers:60
steps: Coat the tofu slabs in a gram-flour batter and crumbs; bake or pan-fry until crisp.|Make a quick katsu sauce from onion, garlic, curry powder and stock, then blend smooth.|Serve sliced tofu over rice with broccoli and peppers, sauce poured over.

name: Chickpea & spinach dal + rice
ingredients: Chickpeas (cooked):130; Spinach:100; Chopped tomatoes:80; Brown rice (dry):40
steps: Toast cumin and garlic; add the chopped tomatoes and spices.|Add the chickpeas and a splash of water; simmer 12 min, then wilt in the spinach.|Serve over brown rice.

name: Tempeh, edamame & broccoli stir-fry
ingredients: Tempeh:100; Edamame (shelled):80; Broccoli:100; Pak choi:80; Brown rice (dry):20
steps: Cube and pan-fry the tempeh until golden.|Stir-fry broccoli and pak choi 3-4 min, then add the edamame.|Toss with the tempeh in a soy-ginger sauce and serve with rice.

name: White bean & kale stew + bread
ingredients: White beans (cooked):150; Kale:100; Chopped tomatoes:120; Wholegrain bread:1
steps: Soften onion and garlic; add white beans, chopped tomatoes and about 200 ml stock.|Simmer 12 min, then stir in the kale until wilted.|Season well and serve with the bread for dipping.

name: Salted edamame
ingredients: Edamame (in pod):150
steps: Boil or steam the edamame pods 4-5 min.|Drain and toss with flaky salt.|Eat warm, squeezing the beans from the pods.

name: Roasted chickpeas
ingredients: Chickpeas (cooked):100
steps: Pat the chickpeas dry and toss with a little oil, salt and paprika.|Roast at 200C for 25-30 min until crisp, shaking the tray halfway.

name: Almonds + apple
ingredients: Almonds:25; Apple:1
steps: Portion out the almonds.|Slice the apple and enjoy together.

name: Soy yogurt + chia
ingredients: Fortified soy yogurt:150; Chia seeds:5
steps: Stir the chia through the soy yogurt.|Rest 5-10 min to thicken, then eat.

name: Protein shake (water)
ingredients: Pea/soy protein isolate:30
steps: Shake the protein isolate with about 300 ml cold water until smooth.|Serve over ice if you like.

name: Hummus + carrots
ingredients: Hummus:60; Carrots:120
steps: Cut the carrots into sticks.|Scoop and dip into the hummus.

name: Tahini rice cakes
ingredients: Tahini:18; Rice cakes:2
steps: Spread tahini over the rice cakes.|Finish with a pinch of salt or a drizzle of maple.

name: Peanut butter + apple
ingredients: Peanut butter:20; Apple:1
steps: Slice the apple.|Spread or dip with peanut butter.

name: Soy yogurt + pumpkin seeds
ingredients: Fortified soy yogurt:150; Pumpkin seeds:15
steps: Spoon the soy yogurt into a bowl.|Top with pumpkin seeds.
